title: SIS - Getting Started - Security Request
body: Overview The Student Information System (SIS) is the backbone that supports the student life cycle. This includes, but is not limited to, the following administrative functions: Admissions, Financial Aid, Student Financials, Student Records, Curriculum, and Enrollment. This document provides information on how to obtain SIS authorizations that are necessary to carry out department responsibilities and business processes. Requests for non-student employees can be made using the online SIS Security Request (or “eForm”) for new and current campus users. This eForm, which replaces the existing DocuSign request form, can be found in SIS, and provides an automated process that will fulfill SIS security requests and approvals in a more efficient and timely manner. NOTE: For student employee requests only , continue to use DocuSign using the SIS Access Request web form. Requirements Needed to Begin a SIS Security Request Requesters: Must have employee access to SIS. This includes: Staff with SIS access from a previous request Active instructors and advisors with access automatically assigned Must have the SIS Security Requests tile on their Administrative Home Page If you need to submit a request, but do not see the SIS Security Requests tile, please email security.authorizations@doit.wisc.edu to let them know you are missing the tile. May not be a student employee Employees the requests are made for: Must have a current or future job appointment Must have a NetID ( NetID - Activating Your Account ) May not be a student employee General Notes for Using the SIS Security Request eForm The form cannot be saved, so be prepared to complete the request once you have started it. Be as specific as possible when making your selections for security. Requests that are submitted without adequate information about the access that is needed will result in processing delays. Review the SIS Role Catalog to help determine roles needed before starting the request. There are notes, instructions, and helpful tips on each page and section throughout the form. High Level Steps Campus user needs SIS access and authorizations added or updated. Campus user, their supervisor, or someone with an understanding of the security needed logs in to SIS. SIS - Add a Security Request : While in SIS, a SIS Security Request eForm is initiated to capture access, authorizations, and other information that is needed for the request. SIS - Approve Security Request Through Email Notification : After the SIS Security Request eForm is submitted, it is routed to the appropriate department and school/college/division approvers for evaluation and approval. Requests will also be routed for to the appropriate role owners for any roles that require additional approval. SIS - View a SIS Security Request : Campus users, supervisors, approvers and role owners can view the status of submitted SIS Security Requests. After all approvals are given, the campus user’s SIS account is automatically updated with the requested access for any roles that were approved or do not need approval.  If any roles require training not completed, they will be added once training is complete.
